original_text:
### Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section)
1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]
2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]
3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

relations.note: The shared callout-competition restriction applies when the main key-point style is used.
The shared callout-competition restriction applies when the secondary/data style is used.
The shared callout-competition restriction applies when the text-heavy style is used.

quotes: Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section)

rules.intent: Preserve clear hierarchy and prevent redundant competing callouts.
rules.rule_text: Use the three approved callout styles judiciously; never place two callouts of the same style in competition on one screen or section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

1. **Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.]

rules.intent: Make a primary key point distinct and consistently framed.
rules.rule_text: Main key-point callouts use bold Brand Blue text (#00529b), centered between Gold horizontal rules (#ffc60a) above and below. Use the approved 2px rule treatment and 16px rule-to-text padding; set each rule to approximately 60–100% of the text-block width.

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.intent: Provide a restrained supporting data treatment that remains visually on-brand.
rules.rule_text: Secondary/data callouts use a Light Blue box (#E6F0F9) at 70% tint with bold Brand Blue text (#00529b), 20px internal padding, and the approved small-callout accent-shape radius. They may include one line icon, such as a 1x pill icon.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Keep dense descriptive content structured, readable, and responsive.
rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callouts for lists or descriptions use a Golden Sand box (#FEF1C8) at 30% tint, a bold Brand Blue headline (#00529b), line icons, bold Sky Blue subheads (#358CCB), and regular Graphite body text (#212121). Use 24px internal padding and a two-column icon-plus-text layout that collapses to one column on mobile.

2. **Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

3. **Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.intent: Bind the Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section) table values verbatim.
rules.rule_text:
The Callout Formatting (three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section) table is a closed, brand-approved set; every row binds its listed values exactly as specified. Do not invent or alter rows.

| item | value |
|---|---|
| Main callout (key point) | ** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text. [GENERAL: rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.] |
| Secondary/data callout | ** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.] |
| Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions) | ** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.] |
